basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Research Associate-II Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent qualifications in an appropriate discipline, Ph.D. degree in Earth Sciences or a closely related discipline with specialization in fluvial geomorphology
qualification.details: M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent qualifications in an appropriate discipline. Candidates must have a good academic record with a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in Class 10th and 12th. A Ph.D. degree in Earth Sciences or a closely related discipline with specialization in fluvial geomorphology is desirable. Doctoral research in areas aligned with modelling of sediment transport, fluvial geomorphology or ravine processes will be preferable. Candidates should have good field experience in the area of geomorphology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-II recruitment is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Associate-II.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-II post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Research Associate-II position ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 78,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent, with a preference for a Ph.D. in Earth Sciences with specialization in fluvial geomorphology.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: IIT Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is SPON/10312/Advt0224.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.
